summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Climate Credit Risk Intelligence Platform Phase 2 - all core features working perfectly with 100% backend API success and full frontend functionality

design_issues.issue: HTML structure mismatches between server/client rendering in table rows and select options
design_issues.notes: Development warnings only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Portfolio CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Analysis run operations (create, execute, retrieve results)
Dashboard page loading and stats display
Portfolio management UI (create, list, view details)
Asset management UI (add/remove assets with forms)
Scenario data page with refresh functionality
Results page with charts and detailed metrics table
